ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "crim_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "zn" INTEGER /* Proportion of residential land zoned for lots over 25,000 sq. ft. */,
  "indus" REAL /* Index of industrial land use */,
  "chas" INTEGER /* Charles River dummy variable (1 if tract bounds river; 0 otherwise) */,
  "nox" REAL /* Nitric oxides concentration (parts per 10 million) */,
  "rm" REAL /* Average number of rooms per dwelling */,
  "age" REAL /* Average age of the buildings in the neighborhood */,
  "dis" REAL /* Weighted distances to employment centers */,
  "rad" INTEGER /* Index of accessibility to radial highways */,
  "tax" INTEGER /* Full-value property tax rate per $10,000 */,
  "ptratio" REAL /* Pupil-teacher ratio by town */,
  "b" REAL /* Black/White ratio by the town */,
  "lstat" REAL /* Percentage lower status of the population */,
  "neighborhood_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the neighborhood */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, apartment) */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "lot_size" INTEGER /* Size of the lot */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "num_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "garage_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of garage spaces */,
  "last_renovated" TEXT /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "avg_crime_rate" REAL /* Average crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "avg_property_tax" INTEGER /* Average property tax rate in the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighborhood is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "avg_property_value" REAL /* Average property value in the neighborhood */,
  "num_schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools in the neighborhood */,
  "num_parks" INTEGER /* Number of parks in the neighborhood */,
  "num_hospitals" INTEGER /* Number of hospitals in the neighborhood */,
  "public_transport_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of public transport in the neighborhood */,
  "walk_score" REAL /* Score indicating the walkability of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., real estate agent, investor, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "property_id" TEXT /* ID of the property sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the sale */,
  "buying_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was bought */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin on the sale */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property at the time of sale */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "neighborhood_id" TEXT /* ID of the neighborhood for the analytics */,
  "avg_sale_price" REAL /* Average sale price of properties in the neighborhood */,
  "avg_rm" REAL /* Average number of rooms in properties */,
  "avg_age" REAL /* Average age of properties */,
  "avg_profit_margin" REAL /* Average profit margin in the neighborhood */,
  "median_sale_price" REAL /* Median sale price of properties */,
  "median_rm" REAL /* Median number of rooms in properties */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of properties */,
  "property_count" INTEGER /* Number of properties in the neighborhood */,
  "sales_count" INTEGER /* Number of sales in the neighborhood */,
  "avg_public_transport_score" REAL /* Average public transport score */,
  "avg_walk_score" REAL /* Average walk score */,
  "avg_school_distance" REAL /* Average distance to schools */,
  "avg_park_distance" REAL /* Average distance to parks */,
  "avg_hospital_distance" REAL /* Average distance to hospitals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)
